race.comment: STYLISH FLIPPER (2) resumes off a dominant trial win at Murray Bridge having also gone to the paddock a smart maiden winner as favourite. He's got plenty of upside and looks to have come back even better. He draws well for Crowther and should go close. BRAND HER BOLD (1) is off a let up having won her maiden in town at Morphettville Parks last time out. Comes back slightly in trip here but rates well and should be very hard to hold out. NOSIE BY NATURE (4) has been good in two runs back, well backed at Oakbank last time when fourth. Can forgive horses on that tricky track, he can improve. TAKEN TO TASK (3) won well enough on debut at Naracoorte and can figure with natural improvement. MISS SGHIRRIPA (9) has ability and can run well fresh.
